novel_features.name: CVE search
novel_features.description: Search National Vulnerability Database CVEs from the JSON API with agent-safe output controls.

novel_features.name: CPE search
novel_features.description: Search CPE names for affected products and platforms before vulnerability lookups.

novel_features.name: Offline vulnerability archive
novel_features.description: Archive vulnerability data locally for repeatable security research and offline analysis.

description: The NVD is the U.S. government repository of standards-based vulnerability management data. Search CVEs by keyword, product (CPE name), CVE ID, or date range. Get CVSS scores, affected versions, references, and severity ratings. No API key required (optional for higher rate limits).
